'''Harloen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> in the [[Belsmuth sector/Legends|Belsmuth sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was considered to be the [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] capital of the Outer Rim.<ref name="GG9" />

{{Planet-stub}}
